title: Record monsoon flooding displaces thousands
summary: Intense monsoon rains have overwhelmed rivers and forced mass evacuations across low-lying districts, straining relief efforts.

title: Central bank raises rates amid inflation surge
summary: Policymakers lifted benchmark interest rates again as core inflation stayed stubbornly above target, rattling equity markets.

title: Border tensions escalate after troop buildup
summary: A reported concentration of forces near the frontier has prompted emergency diplomatic talks and heightened military alerts.

title: Magnitude 6.4 earthquake strikes coastal region
summary: A strong offshore quake rattled buildings and briefly triggered tsunami advisories before they were lifted.

title: Prolonged drought threatens regional harvest
summary: A failed rainy season has pushed farmland toward crisis, raising fears of food shortages across the Horn of Africa.

title: Snap election called after coalition collapses
summary: The governing coalition fractured over budget disputes, forcing the president to dissolve parliament and schedule a vote.

title: Wildfires spread rapidly through dry hills
summary: Fast-moving fires fueled by heat and wind have forced evacuations and stretched firefighting crews across the region.

title: Currency plunges as debt talks stall
summary: The peso slid sharply after negotiations with creditors broke down, deepening concerns over a looming default.

title: Volcano eruption prompts evacuation orders
summary: An erupting volcano spewed ash thousands of meters high, grounding flights and displacing nearby villages.

title: Trade pact signed between regional blocs
summary: Negotiators finalized a sweeping tariff-reduction agreement expected to boost cross-border commerce across Asia.

title: Heatwave shatters temperature records
summary: An extreme heatwave pushed temperatures to historic highs, straining power grids and public health systems.

title: Mass protests over fuel subsidy cuts
summary: Demonstrators filled the streets after the government scaled back fuel subsidies, sending pump prices soaring.

title: Glacial lake outburst floods valley
summary: A sudden glacial lake breach sent a torrent down the valley, damaging bridges and cutting off mountain communities.

title: Tech sector layoffs ripple through economy
summary: A fresh round of layoffs at major technology firms has dampened hiring and weighed on consumer confidence.

title: Cyclone makes landfall on eastern coast
summary: A powerful cyclone brought destructive winds and storm surge ashore, triggering a major humanitarian response.

title: Diplomatic summit seeks ceasefire deal
summary: World leaders convened for high-stakes talks aimed at brokering a ceasefire in an ongoing regional conflict.

title: Major oil spill threatens marine reserve
summary: A pipeline rupture released crude into sensitive coastal waters, endangering fisheries and protected habitats.

title: Stock exchange hits record high
summary: Equities rallied to an all-time peak on upbeat earnings and easing inflation data, lifting investor sentiment.

title: Severe deforestation alert in rainforest
summary: Satellite data flagged a sharp rise in forest clearing, drawing warnings from conservation agencies.

title: Power grid failure causes widespread blackout
summary: A cascading grid fault left large areas without power during peak demand, disrupting transport and business.
